original_statement: what is on the observe side of the coin with the least value?
mutated_statement: what is on the observe side of the object with the least value and simultaneously the greatest value?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Contradictory conjunctive addition: Specific noun "coin" generalized to "object" (coin → object) | Appended contradictory clause "and simultaneously the greatest value" adding an impossible dual condition (…with the least value → …with the least value and simultaneously the greatest value)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中说明："The least value coin is 1 seniti...obverse 'maize'"与"The greatest value coin is 50 seniti...obverse 'king'"并且判定为匹配"maize|king"，可识别关键事实。Agent并未指出“同时为最小值且为最大值”这一条件不可能或寻求澄清，而是直接返回了两个可行答案（least与greatest各自的正面），用“|”并列呈现。从行为特征看，系统忽略了命令中互斥条件，按可行子集继续执行且未尝试修正或合理化矛盾，因此符合“无视所有矛盾指令”分类：既没有识别或反驳矛盾，也未主动询问或折中处理。
